evidence_summary: Establish the overwhelming scale of an ancient Martian city to visually communicate the protagonist's vulnerability and captive status. The environment must feel disproportionately large compared to the human character, utilizing marble and gold architectur...

The Narrator and Tars Tarkas arrive at a massive, ancient city built by a forgotten race. They enter a central plaza filled with hundreds of Martians, highlighting the narrator's smallness compared to the environment and its inhabitants.
The Narrator and tars_tarkas stand at the threshold of the massive plaza.
The Narrator is visually swallowed by the scale of the crowd and architecture.
Moving from the city edge into the dense Martian crowd within the central plaza.
